name: Season Pass
headline: Reserve a premium Season Pass when you already know you want a Camp Dream GA experience this season
idealFor: Best for families who want the simplest premium path
description: Season Pass is the direct-purchase lane inside Camp Dream GA. It is designed for visitors who are already convinced and want a clean, low-friction path into featured Georgia camp experiences.
bullets: A fast booking path for ready-to-buy families
Designed to convert cleanly on desktop and mobile

proofPoints.title: Direct booking when the fit is clear
proofPoints.description: Season Pass supports the easiest route from discovery to payment.

proofPoints.title: The public site now makes the value clear before checkout
proofPoints.description: Visitors can understand the program, price, and next step quickly.

proofPoints.title: The booking flow stays focused
proofPoints.description: Sensitive paths stay free from ad clutter or noisy distractions.

sections.title: Built for confident buyers

sections.title: Clean checkout path

sections.title: Strong first revenue lane

cta.heading: Use Season Pass when you want the fastest route into a featured experience.
cta.body: This path is intentionally direct, premium, and easy to understand.
